ddls:
CREATE TABLE "school_health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the record is associated with */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of individuals (e.g., students, staff) */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active COVID-19 cases */,
  "total_positive_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of positive COVID-19 cases */,
  "probable_cases" INTEGER /* Number of probable COVID-19 cases */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Number of resolved COVID-19 cases */,
  "total_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of individuals vaccinated */,
  "isolation_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of available isolation spaces */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_health_records_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_health_records_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_health_records_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of staff members */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., students, staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is active */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., nurse, admin, health coordinator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the records */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES school_health_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health guideline */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the health guideline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the guideline */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the guideline is effective */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the guideline is active */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
